title: validate_member_patch accepts empty contact_id ('members/')
description: Trigger: JMAP Space/set patch key "members/" (trailing slash, empty id). strip_prefix("members/") returns Some("") which passes the let-else guard; the extracted id is discarded via `let Some(_) = ...`. validate_member_patch returns Ok(()). Phase 2 then calls apply_member_patch, which passes "" as contact_id to upsert_space_member_with_role. SQLite inserts a member row with contact_id="". Bad behavior: a phantom member with empty ID appears in memberList responses. Fix: check that the stripped suffix is non-empty inside validate_member_patch.
